nasb.text: Each of them will sit under his vine And under his fig tree, With no one to make them afraid, For the mouth of the Lord of hosts has spoken.

esv.text: but they shall sit every man under his vine and under his fig tree, and no one shall make them afraid, for the mouth of the Lord of hosts has spoken.

cnv.text: 各人都要坐在自己的葡萄樹， 和無花果樹下， 無人驚嚇他們， 因為萬軍之耶和華親口說過了。

ccb.text: 人人都安然坐在自己的葡萄树和无花果树下， 不再担惊受怕。 这是万军之耶和华亲口说的。
